'''Web browser''' is an application for exploring the web. [[SuperMemo]] will help you collect the results of your explorations in SuperMemo [[Glossary:Collection|collection]]s. When the number of opened tabs becomes unmanageable, use '''[[Web import]]'''. If you select content in the browser, '''Web import''' may ignore the rest of the texts in the imported content.

At the moment of release (SuperMemo 19 in September 2023), SuperMemo supported [https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/edge Microsoft Edge], [[Import from Internet Explorer|retained support]] for Internet Explorer, and added basic imports from [https://www.google.com/chrome/ Google Chrome]. Further Chrome functionality will be added in coming months. If you use another browser that you want supported in SuperMemo, please get in touch via [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/E-mail e-mail].
